sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Trash2, Plus, Minus, ArrowRight, ShoppingBag } from 'lucide-react'; import { useCart } from '../hooks/usecart'; const CartPage = () => { const { items, removeItem, changeQuantity, getCartTotal } = useCart(); if (items.length === 0) { return (

Your cart is empty

Looks like you haven't added anything yet.

Start Shopping
); } return (

Shopping Cart ({items.length} items)

{/* Cart Items */}
{items.map((item) => (

{item.name}

Variant: {item.variantId}

{item.quantity}

₹{(item.price * item.quantity).toLocaleString()}

₹{item.price.toLocaleString()} each

))}
{/* Summary */}

Order Summary

Subtotal ₹{getCartTotal().toLocaleString()}
Shipping Free
Tax Calculated at checkout
Total ₹{getCartTotal().toLocaleString()}
Proceed to Checkout

Shipping & taxes calculated at checkout

); }; export default CartPage;
